last_interaction.value: Damn it, fir se tool execution fail ho gaya. Lagta hai kuch configuration issue hai. Don't worry, main directly Google pe check karta hoon. Pratik, maine Google pe search kiya hai, lekin directly 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day 2026' title se koi movie release information nahi mil rahi hai. Ho sakta hai yeh koi fan project ya phir announcement ho jiske baare mein abhi official details nahi aayi hain?
